title: Implement tickflow epic wave scheduler
description: Add /tickflow-run <epic-id> --agents N to load tk graph/list state, run ready tasks in waves with configurable concurrency, supervise each tick, and recompute the graph after each wave. Shared workspace mode is acceptable for MVP; document the conflict risk.
acceptance_criteria: /tickflow-run <epic-id> runs at least one wave, limits concurrency, advances only after each tick reaches closed/awaiting/escalated/failed-by-policy, and prints a concise wave summary.
